company.selector: #experience + div + div ul li:nth-of-type(1) a span span[aria-hidden] , div:has(> div [data-view-name='profile-top-card-verified-badge']):has(> p + p + div) > p:nth-of-type(2) , [data-testid*='ExperienceTopLevelSection'] p:first-of-type

multipleCompany.selectorSpan: #experience + div + div ul li:nth-of-type(1) ul li > span , [data-testid*='ExperienceTopLevelSection'] ul li > span
multipleCompany.selector: #experience + div + div ul li:nth-of-type(1) div:nth-of-type(2) a div span , [data-testid*='ExperienceTopLevelSection'] li:first-of-type div:nth-of-type(2) a div span

location.selector: div:has(> p > a[href*='/contact-info/']) > p:first-child, span.text-body-small.inline.t-black--light.break-words, .pb2 .text-body-small.inline.t-black--light, .mt2.relative div:nth-of-type(2) span , div:has(> div [data-view-name='profile-top-card-verified-badge']):has(> p + p + div) > div:last-of-type > p:first-child

titles.selector: div:has(> div[aria-haspopup='dialog']) + p, .text-body-medium.break-words , div:has(> div [data-view-name='profile-top-card-verified-badge']):has(> p + p + div) > p:first-of-type

x.com.full_name: div[data-testid='User-Name'] > div > div > a > div > div > span > span
